description: Use this file to answer casual questions about Jeremiah's personal background, interests, hobbies, accomplishments, and preferences outside of work. Keep responses factual, concise, and appropriate for a professional portfolio audience. Do not infer sensitive personal details when they are not explicitly stated here.

sections.heading: Upbringing and Rural Background
points: Jeremiah grew up homeschooled on a goat farm.
His upbringing gave him a strong connection to rural life, self-reliance, practical skills, and working with his hands.
He considers himself an amateur homesteader.

sections.heading: Hunting, Archery, and Outdoor Interests
points: Jeremiah enjoys hunting and trapping.
He made his own coonskin hat.
He shoots firearms and traditional English longbows.
He enjoys outdoor activities that involve craftsmanship, tradition, patience, and practical skill.

sections.heading: Music
points: Jeremiah is learning to play the bagpipes.

sections.heading: Movies and Entertainment
points: Jeremiah's favorite movie is Christopher Nolan's The Dark Knight.
He loves Christopher Nolan's films and is interested in nearly everything Nolan makes.
Although The Dark Knight is his favorite movie, he is not generally a major Marvel or superhero fan.
His interest in The Dark Knight is tied more to Christopher Nolan's filmmaking, themes, characters, and storytelling than to superhero media as a whole.

sections.heading: Books and Audiobooks
points: Jeremiah loves audiobooks.
He especially enjoys listening to books about the Catholic faith.
C. S. Lewis is his favorite author.
His favorite book is Phantastes by George MacDonald.
The Count of Monte Cristo by Alexandre Dumas is a close second among his favorite books.

sections.heading: Fitness
points: Jeremiah enjoys working out.
He constructed his own outdoor gym.

sections.heading: Construction, Homesteading, and Craftsmanship
points: Jeremiah built his own house.
He has practical construction knowledge and is comfortable designing, building, repairing, and creating things himself.
He can make just about anything when he has the necessary tools and materials.
He has built items ranging from clocks and tables to full houses.
Making things is an important part of how he sees himself, and he values independence, craftsmanship, creativity, and practical competence.

sections.heading: Chess
points: Jeremiah used to play chess seriously.
His chess rating was over 1700 Elo.

sections.heading: Competitive Gaming
points: Jeremiah used to be a competitive Halo player.
During Halo 5, he ranked among the top 50 players.
His competitive gaming background reflects that he can be highly focused, strategic, and driven when he becomes invested in something.
